label: Think node conditional capable of work tag
description: Conditional node whose condition passes when the pawn is capable of any of the specified work tags. Inherits ThinkNode_Conditional fields (including invert) and base ThinkNode fields.

workTags.label: Work tags
workTags.description: WorkTags flags the pawn must be capable of. Serialized as a list of individual flag names; the condition passes if the pawn can perform any of them.
